-  <article class="card" data-probe="card" data-identity="card">Card</article>

+<!doctype html>
+<html lang="en"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"><link rel="stylesheet" href="/src/tailwind.css"><link rel="stylesheet" href="/src/style.scss"><title>Ecosystem fixture</title></head>
+<body><main>
+  <article class="card hover:bg-[rgb(210,_220,_230)] p-[13px] text-[rgb(20,_30,_40)]" data-probe="card" data-identity="card">Card</article>
+  <button class="action focus-visible:[outline-offset:3px] focus:[outline:2px_solid_rgb(30,_90,_150)]" data-identity="action">Toggle details</button>
+  <section class="responsive [@media_(min-width:700px)]:w-[200px] w-[100px]" data-probe="responsive-layout" data-identity="responsive">Responsive</section>
+</main></body></html>

changedFiles.index.html:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"><link rel="stylesheet" href="/src/tailwind.css"><link rel="stylesheet" href="/src/style.scss"><title>Ecosystem fixture</title></head>
<body><main>
  <article class="card hover:bg-[rgb(210,_220,_230)] p-[13px] text-[rgb(20,_30,_40)]" data-probe="card" data-identity="card">Card</article>
  <button class="action focus-visible:[outline-offset:3px] focus:[outline:2px_solid_rgb(30,_90,_150)]" data-identity="action">Toggle details</button>
  <section class="responsive [@media_(min-width:700px)]:w-[200px] w-[100px]" data-probe="responsive-layout" data-identity="responsive">Responsive</section>
</main></body></html>
